calendar.matters:
Notice Of For Award Of Attorneys' Fees And Costs On Appeal
Off Calendar Nov-14-2012 Off Calendar

APPEAL OF CIVIL JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-06-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Otion For Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jun-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT QUICKEN LOANS, INC'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS.
Appearances: James G. Snell of Bingham McCutchen LLP (650.849.4882) for defendant and moving party; Virginia Sanderson of Kronenberger Burgoyne (955.1155 x113) for plaintiff and responding party.
Argued and the court granted defendant's motion for attorney's fees and costs. The court took under submission the issue of the amount to be awarded. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
---------------------------------------------------
After hearing, the court ruled as follows: attorney fees granted in the amount of $34,171.00, and costs in the amount of $1,445.62. Mr. Snell is directed to submit a proposed form of order. Parties notified by telephone.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-25-2011 Off Calendar

APPEARANCES: Virginia Sanderson, Esq. of Kronenberger Burgoyne 955-1155 for pltf & opposing party; James G. Snell, Esq. of Bingham McCutchen LLP 650/849-4882 for deft & moving party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO DISMISS BASED ON THE FORUM SELECTION CLAUSE OF THE CONTRACT IS GRANTED. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
